tasks.label: Stop Map Page
args: set -euo pipefail; [ -f tmp/streamlit_map.pid ] && kill $(cat tmp/streamlit_map.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f tmp/streamlit_map.pid; for p in 8501 8502 8503; do pids=$(lsof -nP -iTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN -Fp 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^p//'); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; done; pkill -f 'streamlit run ui/pages/Map.py' 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'Stopped Streamlit on :8501-:8503 (if running)';
